prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: db_894 Product Type: HARDWARE_CLAMP_VISE Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 6pc Universal Tool Chrome Plated Steel Jaws 2" Mini Spring Clamp Set Rubber Tips Description: The 6pc Mini Spring Clamp Set is a great addition to your basic home improvement or hobby supplies. These clamps feature black and red rubber grips, and are just 2" in length, the perfect size for just about anything.

Each clamp is constructed of heavy duty tempered steel, and the uses are endless! Make sure to grab a pack of these today before your next hobby or craft project, or if you need to make minor repairs at home!

Package Includes:
-(6) Mini 2" Spring Clamps Search Terms: hobby Features: - 6 Pack of Clamps - Length: 2" | 5.08 cm - Heavy Duty Chrome Plated Tempered Steel - Great for Use at Home, Hobby, Crafts, Minor Repairs & More! === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 6-pk 2" Black Red Mini Spring Clamp Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Heavy Duty Tempered Steel, Rubber Grips, Home And Hobby Use, Minor Repairs

openai.title_differentiation: Set Of 6, Heavy Duty Chrome Plated Tempered Steel, Rubber Tips, 2" Mini Size, Home Hobby Crafts, Minor Repairs
